description: Built-in generated VP8 IVF fixtures used by make test and make test-decoder-scalar. Binary IVF and YUV outputs are generated under build/tiny-md5 and are intentionally not tracked.

samples.name: gray-16x16
samples.source: generated synthetic VP8 key frame from tests/tiny_ivf_md5.py

samples.source: generated synthetic VP8 key frame from tests/tiny_ivf_md5.py

samples.source: generated synthetic VP8 key frame from tests/tiny_ivf_md5.py

samples.name: gray-32x16
samples.source: generated synthetic VP8 key frame from tests/tiny_ivf_md5.py

samples.name: gray-17x17
samples.source: generated synthetic VP8 key frame from tests/tiny_ivf_md5.py

samples.name: inter-copy-16x16
samples.source: generated synthetic VP8 key frame plus zero-motion inter frame from tests/tiny_ivf_md5.py

samples.name: segmentation-zero-16x16
samples.source: generated synthetic VP8 key frame with segmentation enabled and zero deltas from tests/tiny_ivf_md5.py
